name: Seahomon

signature_move.name: Prism Rainbow
signature_move.description: Spews out a seven-colored beam from its trumpet-like mouth. This technique has the effect of purifying all feelings of conflict such as the enemy's belligerence and hatred.

description: An Armor-level Aquatic Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Light ". It inhabits places with high water pressure in the deepest trenches of the Net Ocean , so it has a small build, but when it rises up to an area of the ocean with shallow water, it seems that it becomes even larger than Seadramon-species Digimon. Although it is still a hypothesis, it is rumored that Seahomon is a survivor of ancient Digimon said to have perished in the past, and that it might have something to do with Seadramon-species Digimon. Its Special Move is spewing out a seven-colored beam from its trumpet-like mouth ( Prism Rainbow ). This technique has the effect of purifying all feelings of conflict such as the enemy's belligerence and hatred.
